revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-660

Power gain (of a radio transmitter)

The ratio of the output power delivered to a specified load by an amplifier to the power absorbed by its input circuit.

{{IALAFooter}}
